title: limbarda crithmoides subsp. crithmoides
intro: Limbarda crithmoides subsp. crithmoides, also known as Sea Wormwood, is a subspecies of coastal shrub found in the Mediterranean region. Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of essential oils, particularly thujone, which has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Limbarda crithmoides subsp. crithmoides include its potential to reduce pain, inflammation, and improve respiratory issues, making it a valuable remedy for conditions such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of Sea Wormwood include infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
